lines.speaker: Joseph
lines.text: If I were as ugly as you I would not dare to show my face in public!

lines.speaker: Joseph
lines.text: Out of my way, punk.

lines.speaker: Joseph
lines.text: Hmm... you smell strange...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Strange how?

lines.speaker: Joseph
lines.text: Like a human!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh! Er... I just ate one is why!

lines.speaker: Joseph
lines.text: Leave me alone.

lines.speaker: Joseph
lines.text: Don't talk to me again if you value your life!

lines.speaker: Joseph
lines.text: Get lost!

lines.speaker: Joseph
lines.text: I don't have anything to give you so leave me alone, mendicant.

lines.speaker: Joseph
lines.text: Have you no manners?

lines.speaker: Joseph
lines.text: I don't have time for this right now.

lines.speaker: Joseph
lines.text: I have no interest in talking to a pathetic meat bag like yourself.

sections.title: When wearing the ring of charos

lines.speaker: Joseph
lines.text: I bet you have wonderful paws.

lines.speaker: Joseph
lines.text: A very miserable day, altogether... enjoy it while it lasts.

lines.speaker: Joseph
lines.text: If you catch anyone promise me you'll share.

lines.speaker: Joseph
lines.text: I haven't smelt you around here before...

lines.speaker: Joseph
lines.text: You smell familiar...

lines.speaker: Joseph
lines.text: Seen any humans around here? I'm v-e-r-y hungry.

lines.speaker: Joseph
lines.text: You look to me like someone with a healthy taste for blood.

lines.speaker: Joseph
lines.text: Good day to you, my friend.

lines.speaker: Joseph
lines.text: Fancy going up to the castle for a bit of a snack?

lines.speaker: Joseph
lines.text: Give me a moment, I have a bit of someone stuck in my teeth...
